name: Young-mitochondria transplantation in stressed aged rat prefrontal cortex
summary: An aged-rat study testing intracerebroventricular fresh mitochondria isolated from young rat brain in control and chronically stressed aged rats.
model_system: Twenty-four aged 22-month male rats assigned to aged control, aged plus mitochondria, aged plus chronic stress, or aged plus stress plus mitochondria groups, with seven young 3-month male rats used to source young brain mitochondria
